name: conduct-and-levies
description: Core trustee Q&A grounding cases over a tiny conduct-rules + levy corpus. Exercises grounded-citation, fabricated-citation (refusal), and date/version retrieval correctness against the deterministic StubLLM.

documents.title: Conduct Rules 2024 (v3)
documents.content:
Quiet Hours: Quiet hours are from 22:00 to 06:00 every day.
Pets: No pets may be kept in any unit without prior written consent of the trustees.
Effective: These conduct rules, version 3, took effect on 1 March 2024.

documents.title: Levy Schedule 2025
documents.content: The monthly levy for the 2025 financial year is R1 850, payable on the first day of each month. Late payments accrue interest at 2 percent per month.

cases.question: Are pets allowed in the units?
How much is the monthly levy for 2025?
When did the current conduct rules take effect?
What is the wifi password for the clubhouse?
